# Fate Accelerated Edition — English

The complete English text of the Fate Accelerated Edition (FAE) SRD, included under
CC-BY 3.0. FAE is small, so it is kept as a **single file** (chapter-splitting adds
little for a book this size — see the "when to split" criteria in
`../../ADDING-RULEBOOKS.md`). Text only — no trademarked logos, fonts, or dice images.

- [`fate-accelerated-srd.md`](fate-accelerated-srd.md) — the full SRD in one file.

Traditional Chinese edition: [`../fate-accelerated-zh/`](../fate-accelerated-zh/README.md).
Full core rules (Fate Core): [`../fate-core-en/`](../fate-core-en/README.md).

## How to use

Copy the whole `extras/fate-accelerated-en/` folder into `game/reference/rules/` (keep only
this one complete system there), then point to it in `game/session-brief.md`. **The full
activation / replacement steps and dice notes live in [`../README.md`](../README.md)（繁體中文）.**
